channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:

item.title: Vehicles queuing onto A2016 causing obstruction, 5th April
item.description:
Traffic regularly queues to access a commercial site on Church Manorway, causing vehicles to stop in a live lane on the A2016. This creates a safety risk due to fast-moving traffic and frequent HGVs passing. The issue is worse between approximately 1–3pm and 8–10pm, particularly in the dark when visibility is reduced, with vehicles often waiting several minutes in the left lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cables Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dustbins blocking pavement., 5th April
item.description:
Dustbins are on pavement not property of number 18 Springfield. Dustbins are stopping mobility scooters and buggies from using pavement between bins and tree.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Springfield, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
